---
kind: task_template
name: Weekly Board Review
description: Weekly strategic review of company health, approvals, budget, and venture pipeline
schema: agentcompanies/v1
assignee: ceo
project: studio-os
recurring: true
---

Review once per week:

- current active venture
- queued venture
- budget burn
- stale approvals
- stalled work
- portfolio health
- need for hiring or pruning
- human-boundary self-improvement cases
